info.name: SentimentalSocial API - Complete Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for SentimentalSocial platform with all endpoints including authentication, sentiment analysis, scraping, campaigns, templates, security, admin, and health monitoring.

item.name: 🔐 AUTHENTICATION
item.description: Authentication endpoints for user registration, login, logout, and token management

request.description: Register a new user with admin role
Login user and get authentication token
Refresh authentication token
Logout user and invalidate token
Request password reset email
Reset password with token
Change user password
Verify user email with token
Get current user profile information
Update user profile information
Delete user account permanently

item.name: 🔒 SECURITY
item.description: Security monitoring and token management endpoints

request.description: Get security system status and token blacklist statistics
Manually blacklist a JWT token

item.name: 🎯 SENTIMENT ANALYSIS
item.description: Comprehensive sentiment analysis endpoints for text processing and analysis

request.description: Test sentiment analysis API availability and get service info
Analyze sentiment of a single text using default method
Detailed sentiment analysis with comprehensive results
Analyze sentiment with multi-language support
Analyze sentiment of a complete tweet object with metadata
Analyze sentiment of multiple texts in a single request
Compare results from different sentiment analysis methods
Advanced comparison with detailed metrics and analysis
Analyze sentiment using a specific analysis method (rule/naive)
Get demonstration analysis results with example data

body.raw:
{
  "examples": [
    {"text": "I love this product", "label": "positive"},
    {"text": "This is terrible", "label": "negative"},
    {"text": "It's okay I guess", "label": "neutral"},
    {"text": "Amazing quality!", "label": "positive"},
    {"text": "Worst purchase ever", "label": "negative"},
    {"text": "Nothing special", "label": "neutral"},
    {"text": "Highly recommend!", "label": "positive"},
    {"text": "Waste of money", "label": "negative"},
    {"text": "Average product", "label": "neutral"},
    {"text": "Exceeded expectations", "label": "positive"}
  ],
  "saveModel": true
}

request.description: Train or update the sentiment analysis model with new examples
Get current status and performance metrics of sentiment models
Get performance benchmarks and metrics
Get comprehensive analysis metrics and statistics

item.name: 📊 CAMPAIGNS
item.description: Campaign management endpoints for monitoring projects

request.description: Get campaigns statistics and recent campaigns summary

exec: console.log('📋 Campaigns on this page:', jsonData.data.length);
console.log('💾 First campaign ID saved:', jsonData.data[0].id);

request.description: Get paginated list of campaigns with filtering options

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Summer Marketing Campaign {{$timestamp}}",
  "description": "Track brand mentions during summer promotion",
  "type": "hashtag",
  "status": "draft",
  "dataSources": ["twitter", "instagram"],
  "hashtags": ["SummerVibes", "BrandName"],
  "keywords": ["summer sale", "discount"],
  "mentions": ["@BrandName"],
  "startDate": "2024-06-01T00:00:00Z",
  "endDate": "2024-08-31T23:59:59Z",
  "maxTweets": 10000,
  "collectImages": true,
  "sentimentAnalysis": true
}

request.description: Create a new social media monitoring campaign
Get a specific campaign by ID
Update an existing campaign's settings
Retrieve tweets collected for a specific campaign
Soft delete a campaign (marks as deleted but preserves data)
Get all available campaign templates

body.raw:

  "name": "Brand Monitoring Template",

  "defaultHashtags": ["brand"],
  "isPublic": false
}
